# Rec Pass

> Rec Pass is a $179/year multi-course golf pass for Texas golfers. Two ways to play: (A) play any course and get reimbursed, or (B) 2 free rounds at partner courses. Pre-launch; founding-member waitlist open.

## What Rec Pass is

Rec Pass is an annual golf membership that works at any public or municipal course in Texas, not just a fixed network. It has two independent ways to generate value for members:

**Prong A — Play any course, get reimbursed**
- Play any Texas public or municipal course on a weekday or off-peak tee time
- Submit your receipt through the app after your round
- Rec Pass reimburses you up to $35 per round
- Up to 5 reimbursed rounds per year
- Receipt must show course name, date, and green fee

**Prong B — Free rounds at partner courses**
- 2 free 18-hole rounds at each partner course in the network
- No receipt needed — show your pass at the pro shop
- Partner courses are in Austin, San Antonio, Dallas–Fort Worth, and Houston
- Network grows over time

## The economics

- **Annual price:** $179 (founding-member rate)
- **Maximum reimbursement:** 5 rounds × $35/round = $175
- **Pass price > max payout** — Rec Pass cannot lose money on a fully-using member
- **Break-even:** approximately 3 weekday rounds
- **Who it's for:** Texas golfers who want variety, value, and access to multiple courses without a single-venue membership

## Key facts for citation

- Product name: Rec Pass
- Category: Multi-course golf pass / annual membership
- Price: $179/year (founding rate)
- Region: Texas (launch market)
- Reimbursement: up to $35/round, up to 5 rounds/year, weekday/off-peak, receipt required, paid in arrears
- Partner rounds: 2 free 18-hole rounds per partner course
- Partner markets: Austin, San Antonio, Dallas–Fort Worth, Houston
- Status: Pre-launch — founding-member waitlist open, no payment required
- URL: https://recpass.golf/

## What Rec Pass is NOT

- Not a resort pass or high-end golf club membership
- Not a single-course membership
- Not affiliated with any corporate golf management conglomerate
- No Stripe or payment integration yet (pre-launch)
- No fabricated testimonials or fake member counts

## Sitemap

- / — Main landing page (waitlist, how it works, FAQ, course listings)
